arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Everton: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool could go nine points clear of Arsenal in the Premier League with a win against Everton.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's FA Cup gamble could get the payoff he wants for Liverpool against Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool face Everton in the last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park and Arne Slot's side are under pressure after their weakened side were embarrassed by Plymouth in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Moyes wants to narrow 'gulf' between Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: David Moyes says the gap between his Everton side and Liverpool is "as big as it has been for a long time" as the two sides to prepare for Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park (19:30 GMT).

arts.ttl: Liverpool consider signing youngster let go by arch rivals – “one of the club’s biggest mistakes”
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly considering a transfer move for a talented young player that their rivals Everton regret not keeping. That player is 21-year-old French forward Mohamed-Ali Cho, who is currently with Ligue 1 outfit Nice and catching the eye with his performances. Cho has already moved around a lot in his career, having also had […] The post Liverpool consider signing youngster let go by arch rivals – “one of the club’s biggest mistakes” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: I was Everton's record signing – I'd have been killed if I left them for Liverpool
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Tony Cottee joined Everton in a record deal in 1988 and he would never have dared to cross the Merseyside divide to join Liverpool had they have expressed an interest in him

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry responds after Jamie Carragher says Liverpool star Mohamed Salah will win the Ballon d'Or
Liverpool playing for ultimate Goodison Park bragging rights in final Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Premier League leaders Liverpool make short trip to Goodison Park for final time knowing win over Everton would rub salt into their hosts' wounds

arts.ttl: New Mohamed Salah update speaks volumes for Liverpool ahead of Everton clash

arts.ttl: Merseyside Derby result is bigger than you think as Everton and Liverpool face 130-year decider
arts.sum: There's much more than three points at stake as Everton host Liverpool in the final Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park
